name: Road to 2024
description: Fight through a crowded primary field and a volatile general election on the standard national map with all 50 states plus DC.
author: PolitiSim Team

name: Sun Belt Surge
tagline: A growth-state map where migration and turnout scramble the battlegrounds.
description: The Sun Belt becomes the center of gravity. Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, North Carolina, Texas, and Florida all demand sharper messaging on immigration, housing, and economic growth.
author: PolitiSim Team

name: Heartland Reckoning
tagline: A recession-scarred map where Midwestern trust collapses quickly.
description: Economic pain reshapes the race around labor, credibility, and industrial policy. Midwestern and Appalachian states swing harder, and your campaign has less room for cosmetic momentum.
author: PolitiSim Team

name: Restoration 2012
tagline: A recovery-era campaign built around recession politics, healthcare fights, and softer partisan walls.
description: Run through a historical-style national race where persuasion matters more, institutional endorsements carry extra weight, and the primary fields reflect older party coalitions.
author: PolitiSim Team

name: Fractured Republic 2032
tagline: A future campaign where AI disruption, housing shocks, and climate migration scramble both parties.
description: Build a ticket in a future map shaped by technological dislocation, climate resilience politics, and collapsing trust in old institutions.
author: PolitiSim Team
